name: @finch.app/ext-ocr
description: OCR extension powered by PP-OCRv6 — extract text from images locally.

finch.name: PP-OCRv6
finch.description: Extract text from images using PP-OCRv6 ONNX models — supports 50 languages with high accuracy, fully local.
finch.systemPrompt: When the user shares an image, screenshots, or asks to extract text from an image, automatically call the ocr_image tool. If PP-OCRv6 is not set up yet, call setup_ocr first to download models and configure languages.

promptGuides.title: Set up OCR
promptGuides.description: Download PP-OCRv6 models and configure OCR.
promptGuides.prompt: /ocr Setup PP-OCRv6 for image text extraction.

promptGuides.title: Extract text from image
promptGuides.description: Recognize text in an image using PP-OCRv6.

mcpServers.name: ocr
mcpServers.description: PP-OCRv6 MCP server — provides ocr_image, ocr_languages, ocr_status tools.
